title: DTCC shares tokenization launch date. 50 firms join Industry Working Group
message_html: DTCC shares tokenization launch date. 50 firms join Industry Working Group ...
snippet: The Depository Trust & Clearing Corporation (DTCC) has announced the launch timescale for its tokenization solution, with limited live transactions from July 2026 and a launch in October. The systemically important market infrastructure received a no action letter from the SEC in December 2025 allow
